documentation_warnings.message: No board name or project identifier found in silkscreen text. Consider adding the board name for easy identification.
No revision marking found in silkscreen. Add a revision label (e.g., 'Rev A', 'V1.0') to track board versions.
Switches without function labels on silkscreen: ['SW1', 'SW2', 'SW3', 'SW5', 'SW4']. Add ON/OFF, RESET, BOOT, or function description near each switch.
Connectors (3+ pins) without silkscreen labels: ['J2', 'J3', 'J1', 'J6', 'J4', 'J5']. Consider adding pin names, signal names, or connector function labels.

findings.message: Board size 116.0x64.0mm exceeds 100x100mm — higher fabrication pricing tier at JLCPCB
findings.description: Board size 116.0x64.0mm exceeds the 100x100mm threshold, resulting in higher fabrication pricing at JLCPCB.
findings.recommendation: Board size 116.0x64.0mm exceeds 100x100mm — higher fabrication pricing tier at JLCPCB

findings.summary: No fiducials on B.Cu (74 SMD components) (finest pad dim 0.20mm — BGA/fine-pitch QFN present)
findings.description: B.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 74 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
findings.recommendation: Add fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment (3 per side with SMD).

findings.summary: FID3 courtyard overhangs board edge by 4.0mm
findings.description: Component FID3 on F.Cu has a courtyard extending 4.0mm past the board outline. If not intentional (castellated or edge-mount part), it will collide with the edge.
findings.recommendation: Verify the overhang on FID3 is intentional; if not, place it inside the outline.

findings.summary: J1 courtyard overhangs board edge by 1.18mm
findings.description: Component J1 on F.Cu has a courtyard extending 1.18mm past the board outline. If not intentional (castellated or edge-mount part), it will collide with the edge.
findings.recommendation: Verify the overhang on J1 is intentional; if not, place it inside the outline.

findings.description: Component R73 on B.Cu is only 0.57mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move R73 further from board edge (currently 0.57mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.summary: SW1 courtyard overhangs board edge by 1.0mm
findings.description: Component SW1 on F.Cu has a courtyard extending 1.0mm past the board outline. If not intentional (castellated or edge-mount part), it will collide with the edge.
findings.recommendation: Verify the overhang on SW1 is intentional; if not, place it inside the outline.

findings.summary: U1 is -9.0mm from board edge (RF module antenna at board edge — verify antenna clearance, not a body collision)
findings.description: Component U1 on B.Cu is only -9.0mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move U1 further from board edge (currently -9.0mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.small_via_note: 12 vias present (avg drill 0.20mm) but effective count (5.3) is below threshold (9) due to small drill size — design may follow manufacturer's recommended via pattern
